rationale: The citing paper references Rutz and Bucklin (2011) only as part of grouped prior-work citations on keyword characteristics, especially the branded-vs-generic heuristic in paid search. It is used to position the literature gap and contrast with the authors' topic-model approach, but the paper does not build on Rutz and Bucklin's spillover model, mechanisms, measures, or empirical results. There is no direct methodological reuse, hypothesis development, or result-level engagement tied specifically to this cited study.
